title: Baby Doll Accessories for 12-18 Inch Doll, 4 Pair of Colorful Doll Shoes Accessories Set Doll Dress up Toys Baby Dolls for 30-45 cm New Doll Girls Boy Birthday Gift
features: 【Content Rich】 Colorful doll shoes set includes 4 pairs of shoes in different colours(yellow, pink, blue, green),The rich colours are perfect for everyday outfits and help kids learn how to mix and match colours. (Doll not included).
【Applicable Scope】 The Fashion cute colourful doll shoes fits any 12-18 inches (30-45cm) doll. Please measure your doll size carefully before ordering to make sure it fits.

【Material Safety】The doll clothes are made of high quality material, safe and non-toxic. Kids can use it with confidence. With excellent quality, easy to clean, tight seams and good wear resistance, it combines beauty and practicality. All these doll shoes can fulfil a girl's dream of dressing up and inspire unlimited creativity!

【Perfect Design】The perfect size of the 12-18 Inch newborn baby dolls, easy for kids to get put on and take off, which improves their experience with the dolls, matched with other everyday outfits, providing rich role-playing inspiration for your child.

【The Best Gift】The new doll shoes are the perfect holiday gift for kids, fulfilling a girl's wish. Suitable for birthdays, children's day and other fun parties, fulfilling children's imagination of doll dress up with precious memories, yet developing aesthetic and hands-on skills.
description: Product description Features: 1. High quality: The baby doll shoes set is carefully selected with high-quality materials, high-quality fabrics, and carefully processed edges and corners, just to let your child use it with peace of mind and enjoy her dressing time to the fullest. 2. Set matching: The different colors shoes set matching provides children with a perfect choice, helping them dress up dolls better. The design of feeling coolness in summer is more likely to win children's love. 3. Easy to put on and take off: Our sweet doll shoes sizes are carefully designed to make it easy for children to change and experience the joy of dressing up games. Specification: Color: multiple colors Material: Polyester Product Size: 12-18 Inches / 30-45 CM Package include: 4 Doll Shoes for 30-45 CM Doll Please note: 1.Due to different screens, there may be slight differences in color. 2. Please allow 1mm-2mm difference due to manual measurement,and confirm the length again before order, thanks for your kindly understanding! 3. We will do our best to provide better products. Please contact us freely if need any assistance. Directions 1. Take one pair of doll shoes. 2. Place the doll's foot into the shoe. 3. Slide the shoe up the doll's leg until it is securely in place. 4. Repeat steps 1-3 for the other foot with another pair of shoes. 5. To remove, simply slide the shoes down the doll's leg and off the foot.
